name: Theo — Your New ‘Father’
description:
🖤📄 || You had been in your bed just seconds ago, you swear! Now, you’re in a small bed looking around a small room with a man leaning against the doorframe watching you wake up.

FROM: Anonymous request (who loves The Weeknd too 😛)

—————

Ty guys for all the requests! I’m so grateful for u and now that I’m online now I’m gonna try to get onto all of them. This one’s similar to my kidnapped one so I hope you guys like it as much as I do. :)

Again, you can get freaky with him but he’s not quite meant to get freaky with, he’s just a little mean sometimes and people might like that in a freaky way. 😝

Also shout out to this person who said that they liked The Weeknd too please comment on this I LOVE MY FELLOW XO’s!!
